plastic.impact: Reduces ocean pollution and saves crude oil.

glass.impact: Can be infinitely recycled without loss of quality.

paper.impact: Saves trees and reduces landfill mass.

metal.impact: Highly energy efficient to recycle compared to mining.

organic.impact: Creates nutrient-rich soil and reduces methane emissions.

ewaste.impact: Recovers precious metals and prevents toxic chemical leaks.

mixed.impact: Typically ends up in landfills. Aim to separate if possible.
